requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — EN 60601-1 (harmonised under EU MDR)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——EN 60601-1（欧盟MDR协调标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——EN 60601-1（歐盟MDR協調標準）

summary.en: EN 60601-1:2006+A1:2013+A12:2014 (identical to IEC 60601-1 Ed.3.1 with European deviations) is the primary harmonised standard for general electrical safety of medical electrical equipment under Regulation (EU) 2017/745 (MDR). Conformity to a harmonised standard listed in the Official Journal of the EU (OJ) creates a presumption of conformity with the MDR General Safety and Performance Requirements (GSPR) it covers. Manufacturers must additionally apply applicable particular standards (EN 60601-2-x series) for specific device types. A technical file or design dossier must include a harmonised-standard declaration referencing the applicable EN 60601 versions used, supported by test reports from an ISO 17025-accredited laboratory or a Notified Body. The harmonised standards list under MDR is published and updated periodically on EUR-Lex.
summary.zh: EN 60601-1:2006+A1:2013+A12:2014（与IEC 60601-1第三版第一修正版等同，含欧洲偏差）是法规（EU）2017/745（MDR）下医疗电气设备通用电气安全的主要协调标准。符合欧盟官方公报（OJ）所列协调标准即推定符合其涵盖的MDR通用安全与性能要求（GSPR）。制造商还须针对特定设备类型适用相关专用标准（EN 60601-2-x系列）。技术文件或设计档案须包含协调标准声明，引用所用EN 60601版本，并附ISO 17025认可实验室或公告机构的检测报告。MDR下的协调标准清单在EUR-Lex上定期发布和更新。
summary.zht: EN 60601-1:2006+A1:2013+A12:2014（與IEC 60601-1第三版第一修正版等同，含歐洲偏差）是法規（EU）2017/745（MDR）下醫療電氣設備通用電氣安全的主要協調標準。符合歐盟官方公報（OJ）所列協調標準即推定符合其涵蓋的MDR通用安全與性能要求（GSPR）。製造商還須針對特定設備類型適用相關專用標準（EN 60601-2-x系列）。技術文件或設計檔案須包含協調標準聲明，引用所用EN 60601版本，並附ISO 17025認可實驗室或公告機構的檢測報告。MDR下的協調標準清單在EUR-Lex上定期發布和更新。

standards_or_laws: EN 60601-1:2006+A1:2013+A12:2014 — Medical electrical equipment — Part 1: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance (harmonised under MDR)
EN 60601-2-x particular standards series (device-type specific, harmonised where applicable under MDR)
Regulation (EU) 2017/745 — Medical Device Regulation (MDR), Annex I (GSPR)
Commission Decision (EU) and OJ C series — Harmonised Standards List under MDR (updated periodically on EUR-Lex)

summary.en: GB 9706.1-2020 is China's national mandatory standard for general requirements for basic safety and essential performance of medical electrical equipment, aligned to IEC 60601-1 Ed.3 with minor Chinese deviations. It became mandatory for new NMPA registrations from 1 April 2023. Testing must be performed by a CNAS-accredited or NMPA-designated laboratory. Because both GB 9706.1-2020 and EN 60601-1 derive from IEC 60601-1 Ed.3, a substantial portion of the physical test data (leakage current, dielectric withstand, insulation) can be shared or cross-referenced, but a separate Chinese test report to GB 9706.1-2020 is still required by NMPA, and the EU harmonised-standard declaration citing EN 60601-1 under MDR must be produced independently.
summary.zh: GB 9706.1-2020是中国关于医疗电气设备基本安全和基本性能通用要求的强制性国家标准，与IEC 60601-1第三版对齐，含少量中国偏差。自2023年4月1日起对新NMPA注册强制执行。检测须由CNAS认可或NMPA指定实验室完成。由于GB 9706.1-2020与EN 60601-1均源自IEC 60601-1第三版，大量物理检测数据（漏电流、介电耐压、绝缘）可共享或交叉引用，但NMPA仍要求提供独立的GB 9706.1-2020中国检测报告，且MDR下引用EN 60601-1的欧盟协调标准声明须单独出具。
summary.zht: GB 9706.1-2020是中國關於醫療電氣設備基本安全和基本性能通用要求的強制性國家標準，與IEC 60601-1第三版對齊，含少量中國偏差。自2023年4月1日起對新NMPA註冊強制執行。檢測須由CNAS認可或NMPA指定實驗室完成。由於GB 9706.1-2020與EN 60601-1均源自IEC 60601-1第三版，大量物理檢測數據（漏電流、介電耐壓、絕緣）可共享或交叉引用，但NMPA仍要求提供獨立的GB 9706.1-2020中國檢測報告，且MDR下引用EN 60601-1的歐盟協調標準聲明須單獨出具。

standards_or_laws: GB 9706.1-2020 — Medical electrical equipment — Part 1: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance (aligned to IEC 60601-1 Ed.3, mandatory from 2023-04-01)
NMPA Medical Device Registration Regulations (Order No. 47, 2021)
NMPA Technical Review Guidelines for Medical Electrical Equipment Safety

gap.en: Both standards derive from IEC 60601-1 Ed.3, so physical test parameters overlap significantly. Key gaps: (1) EU requires a formal harmonised-standard declaration citing EN 60601-1 under MDR Annex I GSPR — a Chinese GB 9706.1 test report alone does not satisfy this; (2) EU MDR mandates a clinical evaluation and risk management file (ISO 14971) linked to the GSPR, which NMPA registration does not fully mirror; (3) Applicable EN 60601-2-x particular standards may differ from Chinese YY/T or GB equivalents; (4) Notified Body involvement is required for Class IIb/III devices in the EU, whereas NMPA uses its own designated testing institutes; (5) European Authorised Representative (EAR) and EUDAMED registration are mandatory for EU market entry with no CN equivalent.
gap.zh: 两项标准均源自IEC 60601-1第三版，物理检测参数高度重叠。主要差距：(1) 欧盟要求在MDR附件I GSPR下出具正式的协调标准声明引用EN 60601-1——中国GB 9706.1检测报告单独不满足此要求；(2) 欧盟MDR强制要求与GSPR关联的临床评价和风险管理文件（ISO 14971），NMPA注册未完全对应；(3) 适用的EN 60601-2-x专用标准可能与中国YY/T或GB等效标准有所不同；(4) 欧盟IIb/III类设备须有公告机构参与，而NMPA使用自身指定检测机构；(5) 进入欧盟市场须强制配置欧洲授权代表（EAR）并完成EUDAMED注册，中国无对应要求。
gap.zht: 兩項標準均源自IEC 60601-1第三版，物理檢測參數高度重疊。主要差距：(1) 歐盟要求在MDR附件I GSPR下出具正式的協調標準聲明引用EN 60601-1——中國GB 9706.1檢測報告單獨不滿足此要求；(2) 歐盟MDR強制要求與GSPR關聯的臨床評價和風險管理文件（ISO 14971），NMPA註冊未完全對應；(3) 適用的EN 60601-2-x專用標準可能與中國YY/T或GB等效標準有所不同；(4) 歐盟IIb/III類設備須有公告機構參與，而NMPA使用自身指定檢測機構；(5) 進入歐盟市場須強制配置歐洲授權代表（EAR）並完成EUDAMED註冊，中國無對應要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 60601-1 is listed as a harmonised standard under MDR; conformity creates presumption of conformity with relevant GSPR. Use of harmonised standards is voluntary in principle but practically required to demonstrate GSPR compliance efficiently.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 9706.1-2020 is a mandatory national standard (强制性国家标准) for medical electrical equipment NMPA registration from 2023-04-01.

source.publisher: European Commission DG SANTE — MDR Harmonised Standards List (Commission Implementing Decision (EU) 2021/1182); IEC; SAMR/SAC (China) for GB 9706.1-2020

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL ONLY] A device already certified to GB 9706.1-2020 has a strong technical foundation for EN 60601-1 compliance given common IEC 60601-1 Ed.3 parentage, but cannot rely on the Chinese certificate alone for EU MDR. Separate EN 60601-1 test reports, a harmonised-standard declaration, and full MDR technical documentation (clinical evaluation, risk management per ISO 14971, QMS per ISO 13485) must be produced for the EU. Engage a Notified Body early for Class IIb/III devices. This is informational; seek qualified regulatory counsel before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 已通过GB 9706.1-2020认证的设备在IEC 60601-1第三版共同基础上具备EN 60601-1合规的良好技术基础，但不能单独依赖中国证书用于欧盟MDR。须为欧盟单独出具EN 60601-1检测报告、协调标准声明及完整MDR技术文件（临床评价、ISO 14971风险管理、ISO 13485质量管理体系）。IIb/III类设备应尽早接洽公告机构。本内容仅供参考，提交前请咨询专业法规顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 已通過GB 9706.1-2020認證的設備在IEC 60601-1第三版共同基礎上具備EN 60601-1合規的良好技術基礎，但不能單獨依賴中國證書用於歐盟MDR。須為歐盟單獨出具EN 60601-1檢測報告、協調標準聲明及完整MDR技術文件（臨床評價、ISO 14971風險管理、ISO 13485品質管理系統）。IIb/III類設備應盡早接洽公告機構。本內容僅供參考，提交前請諮詢專業法規顧問。

requirement_topic.en: EMC for Medical Electrical Equipment — EN 60601-1-2 (harmonised under EU MDR)
requirement_topic.zh: 医疗电气设备电磁兼容——EN 60601-1-2（欧盟MDR协调标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 醫療電氣設備電磁相容——EN 60601-1-2（歐盟MDR協調標準）

summary.en: EN 60601-1-2:2015 (4th edition, identical to IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4) is the harmonised collateral standard for electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) of medical electrical equipment and systems under MDR. It sets requirements for emissions (radiated and conducted) and immunity (ESD, radiated RF, fast transients, surge, conducted RF, magnetic fields, voltage dips/interruptions) and introduces an Electromagnetic Disturbance Risk Management process tied to ISO 14971. Ed.4 is significantly more stringent than Ed.3: immunity test levels for professional healthcare facilities and home healthcare environments differ, and manufacturers must declare the Intended Electromagnetic Environment. Conformity to EN 60601-1-2 and its listing in the OJ as a harmonised standard under MDR creates presumption of conformity with relevant GSPR. [UNVERIFIED: exact OJ citation number for EN 60601-1-2:2015 under MDR — verify on EUR-Lex harmonised standards list]
summary.zh: EN 60601-1-2:2015（第四版，与IEC 60601-1-2第四版等同）是MDR下医疗电气设备及系统电磁兼容性（EMC）的协调并列标准。规定了发射（辐射和传导）及抗扰度（静电放电、辐射射频、快速瞬变、浪涌、传导射频、磁场、电压暂降/中断）要求，并引入与ISO 14971关联的电磁干扰风险管理流程。第四版相比第三版显著加严：专业医疗机构与家庭医疗环境的抗扰度测试等级不同，制造商须声明预期电磁环境。符合EN 60601-1-2并在欧盟官方公报作为MDR协调标准列出，即推定符合相关GSPR。[未经核实：EN 60601-1-2:2015在MDR下的官方公报具体引用编号——请在EUR-Lex协调标准清单上核实]
summary.zht: EN 60601-1-2:2015（第四版，與IEC 60601-1-2第四版等同）是MDR下醫療電氣設備及系統電磁相容性（EMC）的協調並列標準。規定了發射（輻射和傳導）及抗擾度（靜電放電、輻射射頻、快速瞬變、浪湧、傳導射頻、磁場、電壓暫降/中斷）要求，並引入與ISO 14971關聯的電磁干擾風險管理流程。第四版相比第三版顯著加嚴：專業醫療機構與家庭醫療環境的抗擾度測試等級不同，製造商須聲明預期電磁環境。符合EN 60601-1-2並在歐盟官方公報作為MDR協調標準列出，即推定符合相關GSPR。[未經核實：EN 60601-1-2:2015在MDR下的官方公報具體引用編號——請在EUR-Lex協調標準清單上核實]

standards_or_laws: EN 60601-1-2:2015 (IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4) — Medical electrical equipment — Part 1-2: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance — Collateral standard: Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements and tests (harmonised under MDR)
Regulation (EU) 2017/745 — MDR, Annex I GSPR Chapter II (safety and performance requirements)
OJ C series — Harmonised Standards List under MDR (verify EN 60601-1-2:2015 listing on EUR-Lex) [UNVERIFIED]

summary.en: YY 9706.102-2021 is China's national standard for EMC of medical electrical equipment, aligned to IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4 (with minor Chinese deviations). It became effective 2023-07-01 and mandatory for new NMPA registrations from that date, superseding the Ed.3-based YY 0505-2012. Like the EU standard, it covers emissions and immunity and requires declaration of the intended electromagnetic environment. Because both EN 60601-1-2 and YY 9706.102-2021 derive from IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4, test data can substantially overlap. However, a separate Chinese test report to YY 9706.102-2021 by a CNAS or NMPA-designated lab is still required for NMPA registration, and the EU harmonised-standard declaration under MDR must be produced independently.
summary.zh: YY 9706.102-2021是中国关于医疗电气设备电磁兼容性的国家标准，与IEC 60601-1-2第四版对齐（含少量中国偏差）。自2023年7月1日起生效，并对新NMPA注册强制执行，替代基于第三版的YY 0505-2012。与欧盟标准相同，涵盖发射和抗扰度，要求声明预期电磁环境。由于EN 60601-1-2与YY 9706.102-2021均源自IEC 60601-1-2第四版，检测数据可大量重叠。但NMPA注册仍要求由CNAS或NMPA指定实验室提供独立的YY 9706.102-2021中国检测报告，且MDR下的欧盟协调标准声明须单独出具。
summary.zht: YY 9706.102-2021是中國關於醫療電氣設備電磁相容性的國家標準，與IEC 60601-1-2第四版對齊（含少量中國偏差）。自2023年7月1日起生效，並對新NMPA註冊強制執行，替代基於第三版的YY 0505-2012。與歐盟標準相同，涵蓋發射和抗擾度，要求聲明預期電磁環境。由於EN 60601-1-2與YY 9706.102-2021均源自IEC 60601-1-2第四版，檢測數據可大量重疊。但NMPA註冊仍要求由CNAS或NMPA指定實驗室提供獨立的YY 9706.102-2021中國檢測報告，且MDR下的歐盟協調標準聲明須單獨出具。

standards_or_laws: YY 9706.102-2021 — Medical electrical equipment — Part 1-2: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance — Collateral standard: Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements and tests (aligned to IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4, mandatory from 2023-07-01)
NMPA Medical Device Registration Regulations (Order No. 47, 2021)
YY 0505-2012 — superseded predecessor (Ed.3-based, no longer accepted for new registrations)

gap.en: Both EN 60601-1-2 and YY 9706.102-2021 are based on IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4, providing strong test-data portability. Key gaps: (1) EU requires a harmonised-standard declaration citing EN 60601-1-2 under MDR; a Chinese YY 9706.102 report alone does not suffice; (2) EU MDR links EMC compliance to the overall electromagnetic disturbance risk management process (ISO 14971) within the technical file — NMPA dossiers do not require the same integrated risk-linkage depth; (3) Intended Electromagnetic Environment categories and labelling requirements may have minor differences between EN and YY versions; (4) For EU, an ISO 17025-accredited lab or Notified Body is expected; for CN, a CNAS or NMPA-designated lab is required — different accreditation bodies; (5) EUDAMED registration and EU Authorised Representative have no CN parallel.
gap.zh: EN 60601-1-2与YY 9706.102-2021均基于IEC 60601-1-2第四版，检测数据可携带性强。主要差距：(1) 欧盟要求在MDR下出具引用EN 60601-1-2的协调标准声明；单独的中国YY 9706.102报告不满足要求；(2) 欧盟MDR将EMC合规与技术文件中的整体电磁干扰风险管理流程（ISO 14971）关联——NMPA申报文件不要求同等深度的综合风险关联；(3) 预期电磁环境类别及标签要求在EN与YY版本间可能存在细微差异；(4) 欧盟要求ISO 17025认可实验室或公告机构，中国要求CNAS或NMPA指定实验室——认可机构不同；(5) EUDAMED注册及欧盟授权代表在中国无对应要求。
gap.zht: EN 60601-1-2與YY 9706.102-2021均基於IEC 60601-1-2第四版，檢測數據可攜帶性強。主要差距：(1) 歐盟要求在MDR下出具引用EN 60601-1-2的協調標準聲明；單獨的中國YY 9706.102報告不滿足要求；(2) 歐盟MDR將EMC合規與技術文件中的整體電磁干擾風險管理流程（ISO 14971）關聯——NMPA申報文件不要求同等深度的綜合風險關聯；(3) 預期電磁環境類別及標籤要求在EN與YY版本間可能存在細微差異；(4) 歐盟要求ISO 17025認可實驗室或公告機構，中國要求CNAS或NMPA指定實驗室——認可機構不同；(5) EUDAMED註冊及歐盟授權代表在中國無對應要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — EN 60601-1-2 is a harmonised standard under MDR; conformity creates presumption of conformity with relevant GSPR. Practically required for CE marking. [UNVERIFIED: confirm current OJ listing status on EUR-Lex]
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — YY 9706.102-2021 is a mandatory industry standard (强制性行业标准) for medical electrical equipment NMPA registration from 2023-07-01.

source.publisher: European Commission DG SANTE — MDR Harmonised Standards List; IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission); NMPA/SAMR (China) for YY 9706.102-2021

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL ONLY] A device already tested to YY 9706.102-2021 (IEC 60601-1-2 Ed.4 aligned) has substantial test-data overlap with EN 60601-1-2 requirements, reducing re-testing burden for EU. However, a formal EN 60601-1-2 harmonised-standard declaration and independent test report from an EU-recognised lab must still be produced, along with the integrated electromagnetic disturbance risk management documentation required by MDR. This is informational; seek qualified regulatory counsel before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 已按YY 9706.102-2021（对齐IEC 60601-1-2第四版）完成测试的设备与EN 60601-1-2要求具有大量检测数据重叠，可降低欧盟重新测试负担。但仍须出具正式的EN 60601-1-2协调标准声明及EU认可实验室的独立检测报告，并附MDR要求的综合电磁干扰风险管理文件。本内容仅供参考，提交前请咨询专业法规顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 已按YY 9706.102-2021（對齊IEC 60601-1-2第四版）完成測試的設備與EN 60601-1-2要求具有大量檢測數據重疊，可降低歐盟重新測試負擔。但仍須出具正式的EN 60601-1-2協調標準聲明及EU認可實驗室的獨立檢測報告，並附MDR要求的綜合電磁干擾風險管理文件。本內容僅供參考，提交前請諮詢專業法規顧問。
